name: Fried Squid I
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut squid into 1-inch rings.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, eggs, beer, onion, garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Dip squid rings in the flour mixture and egg batter.
4. Heat olive oil in a deep pot or skillet to a high temperature.
5. Carefully lower the squid rings into the hot oil using a slotted spoon.
6. Deep fry until the squid is brown and tender.
7. Remove the fried squid with the slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Garnish with lemon slices.
9. Serve the squid rings with Marinara or Cocktail sauce for dipping.
